title: Verify Talk to Data Answers Against Charts
summary: Cross-check AI responses with charts and filters before acting on insights.

content.summary: Cross-check AI responses with charts and filters before acting on insights.

body.text: Talk to Data is fast; charts are ground truth you control. Verification connects both. For every AI total or ranking, build the equivalent chart with same filters applied. Mismatch triggers column or filter review.

body.alt: Business planning with documents and laptop
body.caption: Business planning with documents and laptop. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: For every AI total or ranking, build the equivalent chart with same filters applied. Mismatch triggers column or filter review.
Start with simple numeric questions before complex correlations—build trust incrementally.

items: Apply saved rules before asking and before charting.
Screenshot chart and AI answer together for audit trails.
Escalate recurring mismatches to column naming fixes.

body.text: Trust AI answers when chart, filter, and preview row counts align three ways. Document verified prompts as team templates.
Teach new users verification before advanced Talk to Data features—culture beats settings.
Verification turns Datilio AI from novelty into dependable workflow—always chart-check before the slide deck.

meta_description: Cross-check AI responses with charts and filters before acting on insights.
meta_keywords: Verification, Talk to Data, Tutorial, Trust
